_comment2: ACS Deploy-time policy: only allow images from trusted registries
_comment3: Trusted: OCP internal registry, Red Hat registries, Microsoft .NET registries

policies.name: DevSecOps - Block Untrusted Registries (Deploy)
policies.description: Only allows container images from explicitly trusted registries. Images from Docker Hub, unknown registries, or unverified sources are blocked at deploy time.
policies.rationale: Using images from untrusted registries introduces supply chain risk. Only images built by our CI pipeline (internal registry) or from verified vendors (Red Hat, Microsoft) should be deployed.
policies.remediation: Use images from the OCP internal registry (image-registry.openshift-image-registry.svc:5000), Red Hat (registry.redhat.io, registry.access.redhat.com), or Microsoft (mcr.microsoft.com). Build your image using the CI pipeline which pushes to the internal registry.
